---
description: "Use when: preparing releases or editing versioned project metadata files."
applyTo: "pyproject.toml, src/guild_scroll/__init__.py, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, tests/test_cli.py"
---

# Release Prep

- Synchronize version in all required files before release commits.
- Add changelog entry in Keep a Changelog format.
- Ensure README reflects added or changed commands.
- Run test suite before tagging.
